# Hellas Reform

> Architecture and total renovations in Chania and Crete, for homes, apartments and commercial spaces. Custom carpentry and metal constructions, prime kitchens and bathrooms, project management and permits, from first idea to handover. One responsible contact throughout. TCG registered.

> Η Hellasreform προσφέρει αρχιτεκτονική και ολικές ανακαινίσεις στα Χανιά και την Κρήτη, για κατοικίες, διαμερίσματα και επαγγελματικούς χώρους. Ξυλουργικές και μεταλλικές κατασκευές, prime κουζίνες και μπάνια, διαχείριση έργου και άδειες, με μία υπεύθυνη επαφή. Εγγεγραμμένοι στο ΤΕΕ. Δωρεάν προσφορά.

Brand: Hellas Reform (one-word wordmark: Hellasreform). This site is Hellas Reform Chania, part of the Hellas Reform network.

## Contact

- Website: https://chania.hellasreform.gr/
- Email: info@hellasreform.gr
- Phone: +30 694 9140772
- Service area: Chania, metropolitan area and surroundings

## Services

- Total renovation & project management: complete renovations for homes, apartments and commercial spaces, from first concept to handover
- Architecture & design: architecture, layout, material direction and design decisions for renovation projects
- Prime kitchens & bathrooms: kitchens and bathrooms designed as central parts of the renovation
- Custom carpentry & metal constructions: bespoke wardrobes, storage, built-ins, furniture and custom metal constructions
- Technical checks & permits: technical checks, permit coordination and engineer procedures

## Pages

- [Home](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/): Services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/blog/): Renovation guides and articles for Chania
- [Cities / Πόλεις](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/cities/): Service areas
- [Partners / Συνεργάτες](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/partners/): Collaborating professionals

## Blog Articles

- [Άδεια Ανακαίνισης Χανιά: Πλήρης Οδηγός](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/blog/adeia-anakainisis-chania/): When you need a small-scale works permit or building permit for renovation in Chania and Crete, and what documents are required.
- [Ανακαίνιση Airbnb Κρήτη: Κανόνες & Κόστος 2026](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-airbnb-crete/): Airbnb property renovation in Crete: 2026 regulations, fire safety, energy certificates, upgrade costs and practical tips.
- [Ανακαίνιση Διαμερίσματος Χανιά 2026](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-diamerismatos-chania/): Apartment renovation in Chania: building regulations, permitted work hours, permits, insurance and what to know before starting.
- [Ανακαίνιση Επαγγελματικού Χώρου Χανιά 2026](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-epaggelmatikou-xorou-chania/): Commercial space renovation in Chania, offices, shops, restaurants and clinics: cost per sqm, permits and accessibility, timelines and how to renovate with minimal downtime.
- [Ανακαίνιση Κουζίνας Κρήτη: Τιμές 2026](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-kouzinas-crete/): Kitchen renovation prices in Crete 2026: material options, ergonomic design, appliances and custom-built solutions.
- [Ανακαίνιση Μπάνιου Χανιά: Κόστος 2026](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-mpaniou-chania/): Bathroom renovation costs in Chania 2026: waterproofing, timeline, trade coordination and tips for getting accurate quotes.
- [Ανακαίνιση Νεοκλασικού Χανιά: Οδηγός 2026](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-neoklasiki-katoikia/): Guide to renovating a neoclassical home in Chania while preserving architectural features, approvals and modern upgrades.
- [Ανακαινίζω Νοικιάζω 2026: Οδηγός Επιδότησης](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainizo-noikiazo-2026/): Anakainizo-Noikiazo 2026 subsidy guide: up to 40% funding for rental property renovation in Chania, eligibility and application steps.
- [Ειδικές Ξυλουργικές Κατασκευές Χανιά](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/blog/eidiki-kataskevi-epipla/): Custom carpentry in Chania: built-in wardrobes, bookshelves, wall panelling and storage designed for your space.
- [Εξοικονομώ & Ενεργειακή Αναβάθμιση Χανιά](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/blog/exoikonomo-energeiaki-anakainisi/): Exoikonomw energy upgrade guide for Chania homes: windows, insulation, heating systems and preparing your application.
- [Έξυπνο Σπίτι & Ανακαίνιση Χανιά: Οδηγός 2026](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/blog/exypno-spiti-anakainisi/): Smart home guide for Chania renovations: lighting, heating, shading, security and networking integration.
- [Κόστος Ανακαίνισης Χανιά 2026: Τιμές ανά τ.μ.](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/blog/kostos-anakainisis-chania-2026/): Renovation costs in Chania 2026: price per sqm, trade costs, materials and hidden expenses. Complete pricing guide.
- [Ολική Ανακαίνιση Χανιά: Κόστος & Διαδικασία](https://chania.hellasreform.gr/blog/oliki-anakainisi-chania/): Full renovation guide for Chania: cost per sqm, work sequence, timeline and project management.
